title: Qlfqeso3O94Yx8Gthwvlu4Sor04H5M
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Last week saw the Fed officially greenlighting rate cuts, pivoting towards its growth mandate (which comes in the form of maintaining healthy employment) and stopping just short of declaring victory over inflation. The Fed's course has been more or less priced-in for risk markets. Equities continued their post-carry trade rebound, while bonds jumped at the news with fixed income markets pricing in more than four rate cuts this year.
